title: viola lanaiensis
intro: Viola lanaiensis, also known as Hawaiian purple violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viola lanaiensis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain and swelling, and potentially treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Viola lanaiensis, such as infusions, salves, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
